title: Garlic Monsoong Corn Arepa Cheese Quiche
description: A silky vegan-friendly dish featuring garlic-infused corn arepas filled with mozzarella cheese, perfect for a monsoon season.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Blanch corn arepa pieces in boiling water for about 2 minutes.
Drain and set aside. In a mixing bowl, combine the shredded mozzarella cheese with minced garlic, chopped cilantro, lemon juice, and pinch of salt.
Spread mixture evenly over each corn arepa piece. Place on baking sheet lined with parchment paper or sprayed with cooking spray.
Bake for 20 minutes until golden brown and cheese is melted and bubbly. Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.

axes.primaryIngredient: corn arepa filled with mozarella cheese
